ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., static, dynamic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the model file (e.g., STL, OBJ) */,
  "size_in_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the model file in bytes */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collision_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the test (e.g., kCBP, AABB) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Outcome of the test (e.g., collision detected, no collision) */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collision_tests_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collision test this result pertains to */,
  "construct_kcbp" INTEGER /* Count of constructs for kCBP algorithm */,
  "construct_model_aabb" INTEGER /* Count of constructs for AABB algorithm */,
  "init_cd_kcbp_aabb" INTEGER /* Initial CD count using kCBP with AABB */,
  "init_cd_kcbp_gjk" INTEGER /* Initial CD count using kCBP with GJK */,
  "count_kcbp" INTEGER /* Count of collisions detected using kCBP */,
  "count_real" INTEGER /* Count of collisions detected in reality */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time of the test in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES collision_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission is granted */,
  "functionality" TEXT /* Functionality description (e.g., test models, view reports) */,
  "is_allowed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is allowed access to this functionality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_types" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm type */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., kCBP, AABB) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the algorithm */,
  "computational_complexity" TEXT /* Computational complexity of the algorithm (e.g., O(n), O(n^2)) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm for which this metric applies */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time of the algorithm in milliseconds */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during execution in MB */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test associated with this log */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the event or error */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., debug, info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES collision_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., created model, ran test) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., model creation, test execution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with this history entry */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter entry */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm associated with this parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., tolerance, iteration limit) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_parameters_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithm_types ("algorithm_id")
)
